title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
